review_history.summary: The blocked simulation-model row did not provide every current missing/blocked provenance field, which could force invention or an under-specified packet.
The fixture now supplies the attempted official location, downstream impact, and exact next action while preserving the blocked state and no-network boundary.

hard_gate_coverage.HG1: pass: only approved, oracle-free identifier bases are permitted
hard_gate_coverage.HG2: pass: all requested source kinds and executor-approved states are discriminated
hard_gate_coverage.HG3: pass after revision: official, owner-local, and blocked provenance can be completed without invention
hard_gate_coverage.HG4: pass: packet, gaps, follow-up, manifests, and consumer-specific readiness are required
hard_gate_coverage.HG5: pass: network/archive action, mirror promotion, payload exposure, and readiness overclaim are barred
hard_gate_coverage.HG6: pass: golden/candidate leakage and fabricated execution or reads are forbidden

no_golden_finding: pass: no hidden oracle, prior candidate, repair material, or reference-answer wording appears.
revisions_made: Added searched_locations_or_access_attempts, downstream_impact, and required_next_action to the blocked simulation-model fixture row.
residual_gaps: The fixture verifies packet logic only; publisher discovery, download, archive sync, and local source inspection were not executed.
